name: Canon TS-E 24mm f/3.5L II Tilt-Shift
description: Balancing a versatile wide-angle field of view with advanced perspective and focus control, the TS-E 24mm f/3.5L II is a Canon L-series tilt-shift lens well-suited to architecture, interior, and landscape photography.

features.Key Features: EF-Mount Lens/Full-Frame Format | Aperture Range: f/3.5 to f/22 | Four UD Elements, One Aspherical Element | Subwavelength Coating | Rear Focusing System | Maximum Tilt: +/- 8.5° | Maximum Shift: +/- 12mm | Mount Rotation: +/- 90° | Locking Tilt-Shift Mechanism | Rounded 8-Blade Diaphragm
features.What's In The Box: Canon TS-E 24mm f/3.5L II Tilt-Shift Lens | Canon E-82 II Lens Cap | Canon Lens Dust Cap E (Rear Lens Cap) | Canon EW-88B Lens Hood for Canon TS-E 24mm f/3.5L II Lens | Canon Lens Case LP1319
